zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabella De'Carew於1178年出生在英國波克夏姆爾斯福德時，她的父親Odo Jr. of Carew FitzOdo De'Windsor24歲，母親Avice de Heireann, of Ireland18歲。她和Robert de Turberville至少有1個女兒。她去世於1248年在英國英格蘭諾廷加姆爾賓厄姆三世享年70歲。

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabella De'Carew was born in 1178, in Moulsford, Berkshire, England, her father, Odo Jr. of Carew FitzOdo De'Windsor, was 24 and her mother, Avice de Heireann, of Ireland, was 18. She had at least 1 daughter with Robert de Turberville. She died in 1248, in Bingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabella De'Carew est née en 1178, à Moulsford, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Odo Jr. of Carew FitzOdo De'Windsor, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Avice de Heireann, of Ireland, avait 18 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Robert de Turberville. Elle est décédée en 1248, à Bingham, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.Bingham's Melcombe, Dorset, England: Melcombe Horsey, Dorset, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Isabella De'Carew 1178 in Moulsford, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Odo Jr. of Carew FitzOdo De'Windsor 24 und ihre Mutter Avice de Heireann, of Ireland 18. Sie hatte mit Robert de Turberville mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1248 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Bingham, Nottinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabella De'Carew è nata il nel 1178 nel Moulsford, Berkshire, England, sua padre, Odo Jr. of Carew FitzOdo De'Windsor, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Avice de Heireann, of Ireland, aveva 18 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Robert de Turberville. Morì nel 1248, nel Bingham, Nottinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabella De'Carewが1178年にイギリスバークシュアイアモウルスフォードで生まれた時，父Odo Jr. of Carew FitzOdo De'Windsorは24歳，母Avice de Heireann, of Irelandは18歳であった。彼女はRobert de Turbervilleとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1248年にイギリスイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアビンガムで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabella De'Carew(이)가 1178년 영국 버크실르 모우스퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Odo Jr. of Carew FitzOdo De'Windsor(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Avice de Heireann, of Ireland(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Robert de Turberville(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1248년 영국 잉글랜드 노틴그함실르 빙함에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Robert de Turberville. Ela faleceu em 1248, em Bingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabella De'Carew родилась в 1178 г. в местности моулсфорд, биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Odo Jr. of Carew FitzOdo De'Windsor было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Avice de Heireann, of Ireland, 18. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Robert de Turberville. Она умерла в 1248 г. в местности бингхам, ноттингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Robert de Turberville. Murió en 1248, en Bingham, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años.
